goal: Phase 2 source/catalog snapshot model for Orun (component catalog)
next_focus: orun-component-catalog Milestone C0 — internal/catalogmodel + canonical-JSON encoder + JSON-Schema generator
notes: Phase 1 of orun-state-redesign is structurally complete (M0–M6, PRs #152–#165 all merged). Coverage floors must not be lowered by Phase 2 work.

Phase 2 (orun-component-catalog) authoritative spec lives at specs/orun-component-catalog/ with 11 docs: README.md, design.md, data-model.md, identity-and-keys.md, resolution-pipeline.md, catalog-store.md, compatibility-and-migration.md, cli-surface.md, sync-model.md, implementation-plan.md, test-plan.md, risks-and-open-questions.md.

Milestones C0–C9. C0 is spec + internal/catalogmodel (pure data + canonical encoder + JSON-Schema generator) — no CLI changes, no storage writes. C1 introduces internal/sourcectx; C2 the resolver; C3 catalogstore; C4 wires plan/run; C5 unlocks TUI consumption; C6 compatibility shims (stateCompatibilityWrites=true); C7 catalog CLI surface + indexes; C8 catalogdiff; C9 catalogsync seam (Syncer interface + NoopSyncer only — no HTTP, no auth).
Phase 2 is local-only. No HTTP, no SaaS, no DB schema. internal/catalogsync ships only the Syncer interface and a NoopSyncer.
Phase 1 invariants preserved: do not rename Phase 1 fields, do not lower coverage floors, do not remove preserved CLI workflows. compatibility-and-migration.md tracks the preserved-workflow contract.

Carry-forward (deferred from Phase 1, candidates for follow-on within Phase 2 scope): MirrorModeHardlink debug-fold decision, RunnerHooks.AfterStateUpdate async-mirror evaluation, --persist-revision flag wiring, Option B trigger-name resolver branch (ai/proposals/task-0019-spec-update.md), --prune-legacy.
